label: Easy To Layer
description: Usually layers well with other glazes.

label: Hard To Apply
description: Can be fussy, inconsistent, or difficult to apply well.

label: Thin Coat Friendly
description: Looks good even when applied on the thinner side.

label: Runny
description: Moves or flows a lot in the kiln.

label: Stable
description: Stays where it is applied and does not move much in the kiln.

label: Opaque
description: Covers the body or underlayers with little transparency.

label: Translucent
description: Lets some underlying color show through while softening it.

label: Transparent
description: Lets the clay body or underglaze show through clearly.

label: Glossy
description: Finishes with a glossy or reflective surface.

label: Matte
description: Finishes with a dry or low-sheen matte surface.

label: Satin
description: Lands between matte and glossy with a soft sheen.

label: Breaks On Edges
description: Breaks over texture or edges and reveals variation there.

label: Crystalline
description: Develops crystal growth or crystal-like blooms.

label: Textured
description: Creates a tactile, foamy, cratered, or visibly textured surface.

label: Variegated
description: Shows multiple colors, pooling, or movement in one finish.
